title: dianthus altaicus
intro: Dianthus altaicus, also known as Alpine Pink or Altai Pink, is a species of flowering plant in the carnation family, Dianthus. It has been traditionally used in medicine for its antiseptic, antiviral, and anti-inflammatory properties, which are attributed to its high content of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The medicinal properties of Dianthus altaicus have been used to treat various health issues, including colds, fever, and respiratory problems, as well as to soothe wounds and skin irritations. In herbal preparations, Dianthus altaicus is often used as a tea or tincture, and it can also be dried and used as an infusion to reap its health benefits.
